name: yebushou：defeat pirates
short_description: Find the leaders of each area and use your skills and reflexes to kill them.
detailed_description: In the 16th century, a large number of pirates appeared in the coastal areas of China. The main force of the Ming army was concentrated on the northern battlefield, while the southern battlefield was constantly retreating. The protagonist was transferred to the coast to assist in the battle. Can you turn the tide of the war?
about_the_game: In the 16th century, a large number of pirates appeared in the coastal areas of China. The main force of the Ming army was concentrated on the northern battlefield, while the southern battlefield was constantly retreating. The protagonist was transferred to the coast to assist in the battle. Can you turn the tide of the war?
supported_languages: Simplified Chinese, English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean
